search_document:
User Request: Supplier dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Suppliers
Type: table
Description: Suppliers with highest sales
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue from suppliers
Title: Product Performance
Type: chart
Description: Sales performance by product
Title: Orders by Region
Type: map
Description: Distribution of orders across regions

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN "Order Details" od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od

sql_queries.title: Product Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductID, p.ProductName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS ProductSales FROM Products p JOIN "Order Details" od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID, p.ProductName ORDER BY ProductSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Orders by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipRegion, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders o GROUP BY o.ShipRegion
